notes: v0.10.0 released 2026-04-26. 18 open Repo Assist PRs. PR #154 superseded by #159. Issues #158, #169 open (protected workflow files, needs manual PR). Issue #157 open (auto-closes when #167 merges). Dependabot PRs #160-164+#178 open. May 2026 monthly issue #171 active. CI is NOT running on Repo Assist PR branches (GitHub blocks CI for bot-created PRs). Main unchanged at v0.10.0 as of 2026-05-15. PR #180 is idle-render optimization (process_messages returns bool, handle_events returns true on event read, conditional draw in main loop).
